message: Fix mac arm64 install mapping and bump v0.2.5

files.patch:
@@ -98,7 +98,13 @@ detect_target() {
   ARCH=$(uname -m)
   case "$ARCH" in
     x86_64|amd64) ARCH="x86_64" ;;
-    arm64|aarch64) ARCH="aarch64" ;;
+    arm64|aarch64)
+      if [ "$OS" = "darwin" ]; then
+        ARCH="arm64"
+      else
+        ARCH="aarch64"
+      fi
+    ;;
   esac
 
   ASSET=""

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "chat-shared-conversation-to-file",
-  "version": "0.2.4",
+  "version": "0.2.5",
   "description": "CLI to download public share links (ChatGPT/Gemini/Grok) and save clean Markdown + HTML transcripts.",
   "license": "MIT",
   "bin": {
